description: Resource type definition for AWS::SageMaker::MonitoringScheduleAlert. A monitoring alert associated with a SageMaker monitoring schedule.

ModelDashboardIndicatorAction.description: An alert action taken to light up an icon on the Amazon SageMaker Model Dashboard when an alert goes into InAlert status.

Enabled.description: Indicates whether the alert action is turned on.
Enabled.markdownDescription:
Indicates whether the alert action is turned on.

---

Required: No  
Type: Boolean  
Update requires: No interruption

ModelDashboardIndicatorAction.markdownDescription:
An alert action taken to light up an icon on the Amazon SageMaker Model Dashboard when an alert goes into InAlert status.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

MonitoringAlertActions.description: A list of alert actions taken in response to an alert going into InAlert status.
MonitoringAlertActions.markdownDescription:
A list of alert actions taken in response to an alert going into InAlert status.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

Arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the monitoring schedule alert.
Arn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the monitoring schedule alert.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

MonitoringScheduleName.description: The name of the monitoring schedule.
MonitoringScheduleName.markdownDescription:
The name of the monitoring schedule.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 63  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,62}$  
Update requires: Replacement

Within EvaluationPeriod, how many execution failures will raise an alert.
